expiration_date.description: Date when the certificate will expire, useful for renewal tracking

friendly_name.description: Human-readable name for identifying the certificate easily

host_names.description: List of host names covered by the certificate, useful for domain validation

hosting_environment_profile_id.description: ID of the hosting environment profile associated with the certificate

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the certificate in configurations

issue_date.description: Date when the certificate was issued, helpful for compliance checks

issuer.description: Entity that issued the certificate, useful for validation purposes

subject_name.description: Name of the subject associated with the certificate, useful for identification

thumbprint.description: SHA-1 hash of the certificate, useful for integrity verification
